## Description

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Milestone

- **Target Version:** (e.g., v0.1.0)
- **Milestone:** (e.g., Tooling & Workflow Foundation)

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactoring (no feature/fix)
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation changes
- [ ] `chore` — Tooling, config, or workflow changes
- [ ] `breaking` — Breaking API change

## Changeset

- [ ] I have run `pnpm changeset` and committed the changeset file (required for `packages/core` changes)
- [ ] No changeset needed (showcase-only, docs-only, or test-only change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` passes with zero errors
- [ ] Branch name follows convention (`feature/*`, `fix/*`, `docs/*`)
- [ ] Feature/fix PRs target the appropriate version staging branch (not main); only release PRs target main
- [ ] Context maps (`.context.md`) updated if file structure changed
- [ ] ARCHITECTURE.md updated if architectural decisions changed

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number) — if applicable
